hero.description: The most comprehensive DST guide site — from your first autumn day as a beginner to the final showdown with the Ancient Fuelweaver, we walk with you through every adventure.

featured.title: Featured Guides
featured.subtitle: From beginner to veteran, every guide you need is here
featured.beginner1Desc: Start your DST journey from scratch. Master basic survival skills: gathering, building, and combat basics.
featured.beginner2Desc: Autumn, Winter, Spring, Summer — challenges and strategies for every season.
featured.charactersDesc: In-depth analysis of all 18 playable characters: stats, skill trees, best roles, and synergy tips.
featured.bossesDesc: From Deerclops to the Ancient Fuelweaver — detailed stats, kiting techniques, and drops for every boss.
featured.cookingDesc: 50+ recipes, in-depth cooking mechanics, and efficient food combination recommendations.

toolShowcase.title: Tools
toolShowcase.subtitle: Interactive tools to help you plan your game strategy more efficiently

recipe.title: Recipe Calculator
recipe.subtitle: Crock Pot Simulator
recipe.desc: Select 4 ingredients and calculate possible cooking results in real time. Supports all 50+ recipes with priority and probability calculations.

damage.title: Damage Calculator
damage.subtitle: Damage Calculator
damage.desc: Select a character, weapon, and target to precisely calculate damage per hit and the number of hits needed to kill.

guide.title: Guide Center
guide.subtitle: Whether you're a newcomer stepping into the Constant or a veteran seeking boss strategies, every guide you need is right here.

beginner.title: Beginner Guides
beginner.desc: Learn DST from scratch: first day survival, seasonal strategies, basic combat techniques.
beginner.pageDesc: Start your DST journey from zero. These guides will take you step by step through the basics of survival.

characters.title: Character Guides
characters.desc: In-depth analysis of 18 characters — find the one that suits you best.
characters.pageDesc: Deep dive into each character's stats, abilities, and optimal roles. Find your perfect match.

bosses.title: Boss Guides
bosses.desc: Complete boss data, strategies, and kiting guides — stop getting wrecked.
bosses.pageDesc: Detailed stats, attack patterns, kiting techniques, and drops for every boss. Conquer them all with ease.

cooking.title: Cooking System
cooking.desc: 50+ recipes, cooking mechanics explained, best food recommendations.
cooking.pageDesc: Master the secrets of the Crock Pot — 50+ recipes, cooking mechanics deep dive, optimal combinations.

tools.desc: Recipe calculator, damage calculator — smart tools to assist your game decisions.
tools.pageDesc: Interactive tools to help you make better game decisions and improve survival efficiency.
